violations.description: Thawing potentially hazardous food. — --Potentially hazardous food was not thawed in an approved manner. Employee used warm water to thaw chicken. Thaw under cold running water or under refrigeration.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. Walls in the walk-in cooler have visible insulation showing and are no longer a cleanable surface.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors underneath the fryers and floors in the dry storage need to be cleaned.

Employee dressing areas and lockers. — --Employees' clothing/possessions were in an area where contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items may occur. Employees shoes were being stored above single-use items in the dry storage area.
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Clean dry location, protected (1 pt deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
